user.title: Set up Object Monitor
user.description: Choose which Home Assistant labels control monitoring, objects, and event categories. For security events, add security_system and one object label to an alarm_control_panel. The integration emits the object_monitor_event HA event for your automations.

data_description.monitoring_label: Add this label to every entity that Object Monitor should watch. Usually keep device_monitoring.
data_description.object_labels: Labels that mean an object or location. Each monitored entity must have exactly one of these labels. One per line: home, restaurant, cafe.
data_description.object_names: How object labels should appear in events. The left side must match Object labels. One per line: home=Home, restaurant=Restaurant.
data_description.category_labels: Labels that mean a problem type or event category. One per line: power, security, internet. Leave empty if categories are not needed.
data_description.category_names: How category labels should appear in events. The left side must match Category labels. One per line: power=Power, security=Security.
data_description.monitoring_timeout: Fallback timeout used when an entity has no label such as timeout_20s, timeout_7m, or timeout_1h.
data_description.heartbeat_interval: Reserved for future heartbeat support. Set 0 to disable.
data_description.debug_logging: Enable additional debug logging for this integration.

error.invalid_timeout: Timeout must be a positive duration.
error.invalid_heartbeat_interval: Heartbeat interval must be 0 or a positive number.
error.invalid_monitoring_label: The monitoring label may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.invalid_category_label: Category labels may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.monitoring_category_overlap: The monitoring label cannot also be a category label.
error.monitoring_object_overlap: The monitoring label cannot also be an object label.
error.category_object_overlap: The same label cannot be both a category label and an object label.
error.object_labels_required: At least one object label is required.
error.invalid_object_label: Object labels may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.invalid_label_name_mapping: Names must use label=Name format, one entry per line.
error.invalid_label_name_label: A label in the name dictionary may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.unknown_object_name_label: Object names can only use labels from the Object labels field.
error.unknown_category_name_label: Category names can only use labels from the Category labels field.
error.reserved_object_label: Object labels cannot match the monitoring label or category labels.
